slots.name: title
slots.notes: Main section heading, e.g., 'Catch Up with Our Latest Articles'

slots.name: categories
slots.notes: List of active tags/categories for filtering

slots.name: posts
slots.notes: List of articles, each having: title, slug, thumbnail, category, date, readTime, excerpt, author

layout_variants.name: Horizontal Split Hero Spotlight
layout_variants.description: A prominent featured spotlight layout. Use this as a starting structure for high-contrast hero layouts. The column or block ratio should dynamically adapt to the image orientation or page container constraints.

visual_specs.typography: Large Serif heading for the article title (text-3xl font-bold leading-tight), small uppercase Meta tags (font-mono text-xs). Excerpt limited to 75ch.
visual_specs.spacing: Horizontal padding inside the card px-8 py-6. Gap-8 between image and text columns.
visual_specs.colors: Card uses var(--card) with a thick var(--border) outline. Text uses var(--foreground) with var(--muted-foreground) for subtext.
visual_specs.layout: Split layout. The ratio is dynamic (e.g., 60/40 or 50/50, scaling based on the media object's dimensions). Stacks vertically on mobile.

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: Fade-in scroll entrance with spring physics for the card offset shadow.
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: Card scale and rotate: transform: scale(1.01) rotate(0.5deg) on card container hover. Image zoom-in effect.
code_blueprint.css_classes: .featured-card { display: grid; grid-template-columns: var(--media-width, 6fr) var(--content-width, 4fr); border: 2px solid var(--border); box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden; }

anti_patterns: Forbidden standard linear shadows; must use flat solid offset shadows.
Forbidden tiny featured image; image must occupy at least 50% width.

layout_variants.name: Asymmetric Bento Grid Hub
layout_variants.description: A dynamic bento-style grid. Column spans and card sizes must be calculated dynamically based on the total number of content items (e.g., wrapping odd items or dynamically sizing remaining cards) to prevent layout imbalances.

visual_specs.typography: Varying heading sizes (text-2xl for featured card, text-lg for secondary cards).
visual_specs.colors: Alternating card background shades using var(--card) and subtle tinted accents.
visual_specs.layout: Adaptive grid layout. E.g. Left column is a large featured card (spanning 2 columns); Right column contains smaller stacked cards. Final cards dynamically expand col-spans if the item count is odd.

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: Staggered grid fade-in: gsap.from('.bento-item', { opacity: 0, y: 30, stagger: 0.08, ease: 'power2.out' }).
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: Tactile wiggle on cards: transform: scale(1.025) rotate(1.2deg) on card hover.
code_blueprint.css_classes: .grid-container { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem; } .bento-item-featured { grid-column: span var(--featured-span, 2); }

anti_patterns: Forbidden symmetric grid for featured items; must establish grid weight hierarchy.

layout_variants.name: Sticky Sidebar & Responsive Grid
layout_variants.description: A split layout with a sticky navigation sidebar and content grid. The sidebar and grid columns must dynamically scale, collapsing into a horizontal navigation chip row or a collapsible menu on smaller devices.

visual_specs.typography: Subtle, clean body font for the categories sidebar, bold display titles for the cards.
visual_specs.spacing: Sidebar width 25% (2.5fr), content area 75% (7.5fr). Gap-12 between sidebar and grid.
visual_specs.colors: Active category links highlight in var(--primary) with a solid border circle outline.
visual_specs.layout: Split layout. Right side content forms a responsive 2-column or 3-column vertical grid. Sidebar collapses to dynamic top scroll-chips under 768px.

code_blueprint.scroll_trigger: Sticky sidebar pin: position: sticky; top: 100px; max-height: calc(100vh - 120px); overflow-y: auto;
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: Category list wiggle: list item shifts right on hover by 6px with custom spring animation.

anti_patterns: Forbidden sidebar that scrolls off-screen; must remain sticky for quick filtering.

layout_variants.name: Alternating Row List (Editorial Diary)
layout_variants.description: Minimal, typography-focused stack of horizontal articles. The alignment of thumbnails and text blocks should alternate dynamically based on card index, collapsing gracefully on mobile viewports.

visual_specs.typography: High-contrast serif headings, minimal mono metadata, and spacious margins.
visual_specs.spacing: Vertical row spacing py-8. Internal card padding px-10 py-8.
visual_specs.colors: Border lines separate rows using var(--border) with zero background fill on alternating entries for a clean magazine look.
visual_specs.layout: Vertical stack of rows. Direction (row or row-reverse) is calculated dynamically based on index (even/odd). Stacks to standard flex-col on mobile.

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: Scroll-triggered line drawings between rows: path self-drawing using stroke-dashoffset.
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: Row highlight: background fills with a soft tint on hover while the thumbnail rotates slightly.
code_blueprint.css_classes: .row-card { display: flex; flex-direction: var(--row-direction, row); align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }

anti_patterns: Forbidden standard bullets; rows must use clear solid separating lines or full brutalist card wraps.

staggered_cards.intent: Fade and translate cards up sequentially as they scroll into viewport.

tactile_wiggle.intent: Wiggle and scale card on hover.

in.description: Standard opacity fade combined with a self-drawing border line.
